.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven-bundled JDK 11 to a standalone JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21 runtime.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; running on JDK 11 would cause runtime incompatibility or missing API errors for Java 21 code.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian-based package manager (apt-get) with Alpine's package manager (apk) to match the new base image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not have apt-get; using apt-get would result in command not found errors during build.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven explicitly via apk since the new base image does not include it.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is a minimal JDK image without Maven; the build step requires Maven to compile the project.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Node.js using nvm instead of the NodeSource apt repository script to support Alpine Linux.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The NodeSource setup script for Debian/Ubuntu is incompatible with Alpine Linux; the previous method would fail to install Node.js.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update Node.js version from 12.x to 16.20.0 to align with modern frontend tooling requirements.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Node.js 12 is end-of-life and may not support newer npm packages or build tools required by the frontend.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed for the deployment strategy.
Add build steps to copy source code and compile the Java application using Maven.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous Dockerfile did not build the application inside the container; this change enables a self-contained build process.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the container entrypoint to run the compiled JAR file instead of starting a bash shell.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous CMD started a bash shell, which is not suitable for running the application in production.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update Storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove the deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Explicitly define the Storybook framework as react-webpack5, which is required for newer Storybook versions.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or changed build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, chromatic integration, and interactions.
Reorder existing Storybook addons to match standard configuration patterns.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the host.
Initialize Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor preview configuration to use the modern default export syntax with parameters and loaders.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project may compile with Java 17 bytecode or fail if the compiler is forced to target 21 but the property says 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); using it causes compile errors or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to handle API migration or specific validation needs in the new stack.
Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin to v16.20.0 for better compatibility with modern build tools.
Add WireMock dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration to the build.
Refactor pom.xml structure with comments and explicit sections for better readability.
Add explicit mainClass configuration to maven-jar-plugin and spring-boot-maven-plugin.
Add maven-surefire-plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Add wiremock and integration profiles to pom.xml for different testing environments.
